changeSet.author: cpp.context.progression
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE court_application_case DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS court_application_case_unique_key;

changeSet.author: cpp.context.progression
changeSet.sql: DO $$ BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc WHERE tc.constraint_name = 'court_application_case_unique_key' AND tc.table_name = 'court_application_case' AND tc.constraint_type = 'UNIQUE' ) THEN ALTER TABLE court_application_case ADD CONSTRAINT court_application_case_unique_key UNIQUE (case_id, application_id); END IF; END $$;

changeSet.author: cpp.context.progression
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS match_defendant_case_hearing_prosecution_case_id_idx ON match_defendant_case_hearing (prosecution_case_id);
